response.justification: While the candidate possesses strong domain knowledge in geospatial data (GIS) and experience building high-throughput microservices, their recent technical stack is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. They lack the recent, rigorous modern C++ or Rust experience that is explicitly required for this core routing pipeline role.
strengths: Strong domain experience with geospatial data platforms and GIS applications.
Proven track record of building low-latency, high-throughput microservices.
Demonstrated adaptability and willingness to work across diverse tech stacks.
concerns: No recent professional experience with modern C++ or Rust (last C++ use was in 2015).
Recent career focus is predominantly on web technologies and full-stack development.
Lacks specific experience building navigation guidance or routing optimization algorithms.
